text: Starlink now in Papua New Guinea! 🇵🇬 https://t.co/MukOODkTud
summary: Starlink now in Papua New Guinea! 🇵🇬
ai_summary: Elon announced Starlink's expansion into Papua New Guinea, marking geographic growth of SpaceX's satellite internet service into a new market. This demonstrates Starlink's ongoing strategy to expand global coverage into underserved regions, exemplifying how the company is scaling its satellite internet business to reach customers in areas with limited terrestrial infrastructure.
embed_html:
Starlink now in Papua New Guinea! 🇵🇬 https://t.co/MukOODkTud

— Elon Musk (@elonmusk) May 2, 2026

summary: Try the Grok Imagine agent mode beta!
ai_summary: Elon Musk announced the beta launch of Grok's Imagine agent mode, a new AI capability feature. This represents a product development milestone for xAI's Grok AI assistant, demonstrating the company's iteration on AI agent functionality and competitive positioning in the AI market against other large language models.

text: Grok Voice is used by Starlink right now https://t.co/dSkO5AUCY7
summary: Grok Voice is used by Starlink right now
ai_summary: Elon Musk announces that Grok Voice (xAI's voice AI assistant) is currently being deployed and used operationally by Starlink, demonstrating real-world implementation of the technology beyond beta or testing phases. This represents a concrete business milestone showing cross-company integration between xAI's Grok AI platform and Starlink's satellite internet service, indicating both product maturity and strategic synergy between Musk's companies.
embed_html:
Grok Voice is used by Starlink right now https://t.co/dSkO5AUCY7
